name: Oakhaven Rumors (d6)
description: Tavern gossip at the Crossroads Inn. Roll or choose when players ask around Oakhaven. Each rumor seeds a different thread.

results.text: Flick's metal cows were seen chasing sheep across Farmer Greta's fields again.
Margaux Delacroix hasn't come out of her manor in three days. Something about "noises in the cellar."
A strange woman in fine clothes has been asking questions about adventurers in town. (Herald Elara — foreshadowing.)
Trade caravans through Emerald Pass have been getting robbed by someone calling himself a "prince."
Brother Aldric insists the sundial at the shrine is broken. He's measured it eleven times. (Temporal foreshadowing.)
Old Barret says he saw a group of adventurers in golden armor pass through without stopping. Headed toward the capital. (The Iron Vanguard.)

name: Valerius Time Echo Summon (d4)
description: Valerius's Legendary Action: Summon Time Echo (3 Actions, 2/Day). He tears open a temporal rift and summons an Echo of a previous boss. The Echo has half HP, lasts 3 rounds, and dissolves into golden sand when destroyed or expired.

results.text: Wight Echo — HP 30. Key: Life Drain (necrotic, max HP reduction). A shimmering golden specter of the Wine-Cellar Wight.
Bandit Prince Echo — HP 60. Key: 2 attacks, Riposte, Parry. A golden silhouette of Sir Corwin, fighting without honor this time.
Gilded Sentinel Echo — HP 70. Key: Slam, Regeneration 10/turn. A half-formed golden construct, flickering in and out of time.
Duplicate King Echo — HP 75. Key: Chronal Bolt (+9, 4d8+4 force), Slow (DC 17). A translucent copy of the false king, still smiling.
